items.reason: New core sampler tests cover derivation, normalization, hash-threshold decisions, distribution, cached request decisions, and concurrent config reads.
New config tests cover proto updates, ppm bounds, disabled/full-rate folding, previous-good retention, and config publication.
New access tests cover CLIENT/ACCESS/REQUEST_OUT classification, request-sampled forced access, access sampling, skipped construction, and logSampled formatting.
New integration tests exercise LOG/PLOG/VLOG payload suppression, diagnostic supplement sampling, FATAL/CHECK bypass, and background-log bypass.
Updated RPC metadata tests cover sampler disabled/full/zero-rate states and request sampling decision propagation through MetaPb.
New ST coverage exercises worker-to-client sampling config delivery and cross-process request sampling on KV operations.
Updated performance tests add QPS guardrails and sampled-out access-recorder field construction checks for the hot logging paths.
The PR adds sample-rate gflag validators and transactional dynamic flag update logic, but this touched test only changes indentation and adds no assertions for those new branches.
No test covers the new EmbeddedConfig RequestSampleRate/AccessSampleRate/DiagnosticSampleRate setters storing valid values and ignoring invalid values before parse.
